name: WebSocket Interceptor
description: Intercept and filter WebSocket messages with DevTools integration

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* https://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* wss://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* wss://127.0.0.1:*
